3077140.name: Nightmare Kitchen
3077140.description:
Nightmare Kitchen: Welcome to the Greasepunk Apocalypse

The Story So Far

Welcome to Tater Hills Mall, the proud home of Spudnik Biosystems, creators of the nutritional wonder-ingredient "Cholesterite." Once hailed as a miracle, Cholesterite's side effects are now clear: an insatiable, demented army of mutant food bent on devouring humanity. Unfortunately, you're on today's menu.

Play as chefs from the mall's abandoned food court who find themselves strangely mutated and uniquely suited to fight back. Join other survivors trapped in this neon-lit nightmare, alone or in Co-Op with up to four players, as you battle to escape the cursed culinary apocalypse.

Key Features

Food-Fueled Foes:
Face twisted, unsettling, and grotesque food monsters, each with diabolical behaviors and attacks. Take on monstrous bosses like killer tacos, rabid salads, and vengeful desserts.

Procedurally Delicious Dungeons:
Explore ever-changing layouts filled with deadly traps, challenging puzzles, and environments themed around American, Mexican, Asian, Dessert, and Health food.

Absurd Culinary Arsenal:
Craft and wield bizarre weapon combinations. Load your guns with distinct food-based ammo types, each creating wild combat and environmental effects.

Loot and Leveling:
Gather mountains of weird and powerful loot. Boost your chef's stats to gain an edge against your culinary nightmares.

Roguelite Replayability:
Death comes at a cost: you'll drop loot, weapons, and temporary upgrades. But don't worry because permanent upgrades, story progress, and hidden secrets carry over, ensuring every run feels rewarding and unique.

4-Player Co-Op Chaos:
Team up with friends online to tackle the mall’s greasy horrors. Survive, fight, and laugh through the madness together—because everything’s better with friends, even the apocalypse.

英语*
